projectDescription: A drop-in modification of TheNexusAvenger's LocalAudioSubtitles that routes subtitle display through Norteous's Subtitle Engine for enhanced visual presentation in Roblox games.
keyFeatures: Drop-in replacement for LocalAudioSubtitles module with Subtitle Engine rendering
Typing animation support with configurable per-character delay
Speaker profiles with display names, colors, and modifiers
Subtitle levels for filtering content by priority
Macro system for reusable subtitle data templates
Rolloff-based audio distance detection for spatial subtitles
Subtitle deduplication and stacking for overlapping audio
VR support via Nexus VR Core integration
